Conversation.line: Who do you think has the better special forces? The Coalition or the Separatists?
I don't know enough about them to say.
My gut says the Coalition given the resource advantage.
They've both got their strengths and weaknesses I guess.
I suppose if we're lucky, or unlucky depending on what happens, we might find out ourselves.
The Coalition likes to keep their stuff under wraps so, it's hard to say.
Their kit is generally a lot better though.
As for the Separatists, it's hard to say for them as well but, in general their equipment's worse.
But enough about that, I've gotta keep an eye on outside.
Can the politics, I don't want to instigate anything on this sub.
Aye aye captain.
You lot heard of those Vanguard guys?
They've made a big name for themselves given the mess they tend to cause so, yes.
I really hope to Jove we don't end up finding any, they tend to be pretty antsy even around other Separatist guys.
Well you've just jinxed us now so, thanks a lot.
... No I haven't, who are they?
They're Separatist forces, they've got some pretty serious gear and funding to work with.
Well fingers crossed we're not on the receiving end of them then.
Agreed but for now, it's best we don't worry about it, we've got other stuff that needs contending with.
Got some pretty nice helmets don't they?
They do, though I'm not really sure why they made them look like wolves and cats, pretty weird I'll not lie.
I remember reading a book on ancient Earth history, a lot of tribes back in the day used animal icons to show aggression or, really any form of emotion.
Still really weird nontheless no?
Less chat, more focussing please.
... Yes captain.
Cut that talk, everyone's busy.
... Aye aye sir.
Preso Latex is a horrible creation, who on Earth thought it was a good idea?
It's pretty useful for making ammo with, which you jarheads seem to go through a lot.
No need to so nasty about it.
I'll be as nasty as I want to.
Hey I'm the one who keeps things out of our sub and makes sure no one backstabs you, how about you be slightly more grateful?
And I'm the one who has to plug the holes that are made when you fail at that.
The both of you PLEASE SHUT UP! I can't do anything when all I can hear is you two yabbing away in my headphones.
If we've got any on board keep it in those containment box things, that stuff is a nightmare to keep safe.
We got any anti-chemical stuff in case someone goes mad and tries to kill us all with it?
Probably not but, just hope nothing goes wrong for now.
Eugh, I don't really know, all I know is it's useful for ammo.
It's some pretty weird stuff I'll not lie, given how nasty it is I don't know why we haven't chosen something better.
If it ain't broke don't fix it I guess, it might as well be the backbone of the ammo industry right now.
Makes use of all the Elastin I suppose, mix it with the right things and you've got a chemical that can be used in the production of stuff.
That'd be nice if it's only purpose wasn't borderline illegal weapons.
I dunno, Ignis Latex has been used to for bulk Magnesium and Flashpowder, might be why there's so much ammo lying around these days.
Save the heartfelt convo for when we dock, remember we need to stay foccused.
Oh yes, aye aye captain.
I'll make sure you get an idea of how terrible it is if you keep hogging comms for chit chat.
... Aye aye sir.
I really don't like how war-like the situation is...
It's been like that for years, nothing changes.
There's been lots of reports of outpost security having to deal with a lot of gun violence and stabbings and what not from either side.
And also some use of some pretty hardcore chemicals to kill people.
What chemicals were they?
I think Ignis Latex though there was reports that the victim's skin sort of... boiled away underneath, nothing left but a bloody mess.
Wow, thanks for that fantastic mental image...
Not sure what you expected, they're opposed ideologically.
Opposition causes conflict, that naturally tends to favour getting rid of the opposition.
Fingers crossed we don't have this turn into a total war then.
Given how things are going right now, I seriously doubt crossing your fingers will do anything.
Can the talk let's stay focussed please.
... Aye sir.
No extremists on my sub, watch your mouth or you're getting my gun barrel down your throat.
... yes of course, Aye aye captain.
I think we should get one of those Anti-Materiel Rifles, they can really ruin someone's day.
I have a feeling that would be incredibly expensive to maintain, those big powerful rounds aren't cheap you know.
Screw price, I just want to put a big hole into something.
I'm sure security isn't concerned at all.
I think the Separatist's option's better, that thing can take how much different ammo.
I know about the AMR but, not whatever that is.
A sort of, rocket or grenade launcher, it loads from the front and some of the ammo's pretty bonkers.
Makes me wonder why the Coalition doesn't have something like that.
Well one's a lot more precise than the other so, I suppose it comes down to that.
I'm sorry but you'd be more of a danger to us with one than an actual enemy, I've seen how you shoot.
Like you're any better, look who's talking...
At least I don't openly talk about it.
For Jove's sake I was just saying I want one, you're such a buzzkill.
Any of you wondered why the sub mounted Machine Gun turrets are in such a low calibre?
Not really sure, you'd think they'd go for something a bit beefier given it's mounted outside?
Eh... probably just to make it a cheap and energy efficient way of slinging lead a things, coilguns are cool but they take a lot of power.
I suppose that makes sense.
It's meant to be a really cheap, power efficient means of defence, I suppose they chose 762 because it's a lot easier to bulk manufacture.
Now obviously something a lot bigger calibre would be really cool, but Coilguns are kinda everywhere now and MG turrets are legacy options.
Imagine a a really small calibre sub turret, that'd be pretty cheap to run.
That'd be only good against those really small fish I see out of the window, though I guess they could be alright for the interior.
Anyone seen those Vanguards? Fine suits if I must say...
Um ... What? What are you getting at?
Oh you and me both know.
Jeez, you really need to get your priorities straight if that's what's on your mind...
What are you getting at with that?
What you don't like how they're really high end frag suits that can take a beating?
... You know what nevermind ignore what I was thinking.
Your imagination must be one hell of a thing, those suits show absolutely nothing.
Oh I definitely know one of us is screwed if you get my drift.
Stop defiling my ears please can we just get on with our jobs?
I think you need some anti-psychotics, you've been acting... weird lately.
Hey I'm not one to complain about some good ass in a skintight suit, you know?
You won't have an ass yourself if security decides they're tired of your less than tasteful statements, we're professionals here so can it with that.
Have your fantasies outside of comms please, I'd like to not hear how much of a creepy weirdo you are.
What are you jealous or something?
Absolutely not, I have little to no patience for people like you.
Wow, I've never seen someone get so angry over this before, calm down it's a damn joke, learn to get a sense of humour you boring bastard.
Have your fantasies outside of comms please, I'd like to not hear how much of a creepy weirdo you are.
The hell do you mean? Having some high end armour like that'd be great for us.
I can tell you were going a different direction initially but, whatever.
I've learnt from last time, don't worry.
Can the small talk until we dock.
Oh um, yes captain...
You're not going on one of those tirades again, shut up before you salary's halved.
shit-um... Aye aye captain, won't happen again.
There's a lot of guns on the market nowadays isn't there?
Tell me about it, they're everywhere, I'm kinda concerned both sides are planning something... really big.
The Coalition used to really restrict guns, yet everyone has automatics and pistols are handed out like food, it's madness.
Yeah I'm... concerned, at no point has there been this many, a heavily armed Europa is a dangerous Europa...
You seen how the crawler and raptor populations have completely shrunk? I really blame guns for it, this is actively causing moon-wide issues.
Well, I guess a heavily armed Europa can be a free Europa too, just so long as there isn't 2 factions trying to tear each other's necks out...
Time for war I'm afraid.
It's clear as day, we've got at most a couple of weeks before this all goes hot.
Lovely, exactly what I wanna hear.
Just hope we're on the winning side.
Hope is a very bad thing to rely on, just saying...
Frag, bullets, Preso Latex, raptors, rads... I don't like how much can kill us here.
Seriously how in the hell did things get this bad?
I couldn't tell you I'll be honest, looks like we're just inventing new and improved ways to kill each other.
I don't understand the chemical weapons usage at all.
To be used as a terror weapon of course, I've heard talk of the Coalition beginning to look into ways of restricting manufacturing of it.
Though, knowing the Coalition they'll turn a blind eye because they want such weapons for... dealing with less than desirable individuals.
Only making even more as we speak.
I've even heard about potentially making artefacts weapons.
Yes, nothing specific though I just overheard it once.
Can't wait for the nightmare that'll cause, literally in the case of one of them.
Don't forget the furries, never forget about the furries.
I'm sorry the what now? Is this meant to be some sort of weird inside joke I'm too sane to understand?
I think people already know what I'm on about.
I didn't realise this was some weird secret only I'm not allowed to know about-you know what nevermind...
I miss the times when guns weren't everywhere, It's really not safe when even your local junkie has a handgun hidden in his pocket.
Because everyone's gone mad with them, I bet you right now both sides are planning to wage a total war against each other.
Yeah the past... I wanna say 2 or so years have been really rough when it comes to their relations, it's just a matter of what'll break the thresher's back.
I'd say we don't fall behind, I don't want to be that one person who isn't armed and I need a gun, can we get more guns and ammo on this can?
That's definitely not a question for me, ask the captain.
What can I say? More guns equals more security all around.
Not when said security is in the hands of a maniac... You know the opiate problem on Europa and arming almost everyone I think is a horrible idea.
I think both sides have more to worry about than some random junkies trying to rob people, which mostly goes down horribly for them anyways.
Both sides are clearly getting ready for war, it's obvious.
They're making sure they cover all their bases, including arming civilians.
I think that's a horrible idea, giving every man, woman and child their own weapon seems incredibly uneccessary and dangerous.
Then run your own campaign rallying against it, I'm sure that'll go down well for you.
I don't like beaurocracies...
Alright who's moved the armour vests again? This is the third time someone's shuffled all the stuff around.
Goddamnit really? We kinda need those.
I hope to Jove not, we need them in case shit goes south and we get boarded.
Like with everything on this submarine it's disorganised as hell, we really need to start sorting this stuff out better.
I'd do that if there was any reason to but we partially renovate this submarine everytime we dock and I'm sick to death of having my work all for nothing.
Looks like the submarine fairy's been moving shit again.
At this point it wouldn't surprise me if that's true anymore, the past few days have been wacky as hell.
Tell me about it, from the ruins to all this odd gravitational crap on this moon.
Plenty more strange stories to come, I can tell you that right now.
I really want a helmet as a war trophy.
Don't we have enough of those as is?
I'm more talking from some big target like a Vanguard or some pirate leader or something like that.
I think either of those aren't really comparable to difficulty.
As in like a Vanguard's or Protectorates or whatever they're called? I can tell you right now that just isn't happening, you know just how dangerous they are right?
That's just gonna make it all the more rewarding.
They'll steamroll over us and take over the submarine.
Do you really have that little confidence in us?
You're security I'd expect you to know a thing or two about who we might be fighting.
I do but I'm not as pessimistic as you.
When we next jumping in a wreck? I wanna get out of this tin can for once.
You'd rather be out there than in here?
Yes, do you not like finding people's mementos they leave behind in wrecks?
I do but I don't think that's our top priority, besides dead people's things just creep me out.
Your loss once we find one then.
I'm in for it, just as long as we don't get jumped by anyone else or... something else inside of it.
I've heard some pretty nasty horror stories in some of those submarines.
I think finding a gold mine of equipment more than makes it worth it.
Yeah but I'm not one to test my luck, gambling's never been my strong suit...
Yeah I'm sure that won't end poorly.
Oh come on it's not that bad in there.
Just get back to doing what you were please.
Oh alright fine...
Got myself a new rifle today, kinda cost a pretty penny though.
To think that ancient design is still liberating places, humanity never changes.
I hope that Coalition Big BR we managed to grab still works, those things are a bitch to get ahold of.
Yeah our alternatives are kind of crap, the fire rate makes them so hard to control.
How did things get this messed up anyways?
Come on! It's hardly like it's a surprise! Europa's been in the heat ever since Earth stopped talking, now we're on our own and now the Coalition is going mad for power.
Infiltrators scare me.
I'd keep your voice down, I doubt you'd want to start throwing that name around.
By Jove I'm bored, it's all this being stuck inside a metal tube all day and night, really fucks with me.
What i'd do for that gun I got my eyes on not too long ago...
